MAC USERS — READ THIS FIRST (30 seconds)
=========================================

The easiest install: skip the DMG entirely. Open Terminal
(press Cmd-Space, type "Terminal") and paste this one line:

  curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wassermanproductions/cork-board/main/install.sh | bash

That downloads the right build for your Mac, installs it to
Applications, and opens it. No warnings, nothing else to do.


If you downloaded the DMG instead
---------------------------------
macOS will say Cork Board "is damaged and can't be opened" and
suggest moving it to the Trash. The app is NOT damaged. This is
macOS's standard warning for apps that aren't Apple-notarized
(notarization requires a paid Apple Developer account; Cork Board
is free, open-source software).

The fix:
  1. Open the DMG and drag Cork Board into Applications.
  2. In Terminal, paste:   xattr -cr "/Applications/Cork Board.app"
  3. Open Cork Board from Applications. It opens normally from
     now on, forever.

You can read every line of the install script and the app's source
at https://github.com/wassermanproductions/cork-board
